digest.component_or_area: review-gate calibration (code-review blocking lane, plan-review, completion-verifier)
propositions: Code review is too loose: zero blocking finding-votes across 162 post-recalibration changes while confirmed must-fix findings passed as advisories below the 0.95 threshold.
A block threshold should be derived from adjudicated field data and enabled for serious-tier code-review criteria over the code-v2 cohort, passing the ADR-0036 A/B gate before flipping.
Plan-review advisory remediation is protocol-inflated by a mandate to remediate all valid advisories; guidance should be loosened to judgment so organic advisory uptake can be measured.
Completion-verifier FAIL verdicts are not durably persisted, ratchet piecemeal across CI cycles, and signed-children epic ACs defeat the certifiable:false escape hatch.
Leaf plans drift from their parent plan and no plan-review criterion checks a leaf's scope against its parent, so drift is only caught at epic-close verification.
A new plan-review criterion should gate leaf-plan/parent-plan scope containment at claim-gating review so drift is caught ticket-by-ticket.
